case_title: PATRICK WONG VS. ZHUO WEI YAN et al.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,428.86 FILED BY WONG, PATRICK AS TO DEFENDANT YAN, ZHUO WEI ZHENG, JIN CHANG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED AUG-26-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YAN, ZHUO WEI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, PATRICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YAN, ZHUO WEI ZHENG, JIN CHANG $8,428.86 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,583.86, DEFENDANTS ZHOU WEI YAN AND JIN CHANG ZHENG JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF PATRICK WONG. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-31-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF PATRICK WONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JIN CHANG ZHENG IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ZHOU WEI YAN IS NOT PRESENT NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
